title: Junior Veterinarian/ Senior Veterinarian/ Lead Veterinarian
description:
Job Title

Veterinarian(Junior/ Senior/ Lead)

Occupation

VETERINARIAN

Job Description & Requirements

Join Our Fear-Free Veterinary Family at Paws N’ Claws! 🐾

Position: Veterinarian (Full-Time)
Location: Paws N’ Claws Veterinary Surgery(Upper Thomson), Paws N’ Claws Veterinary Surgery(Yishun)
Apply at: info.pnc2020@gmail.com

Are you a passionate Veterinarian looking for a supportive, progressive, and Fear-Free environment to grow in?

Paws N’ Claws Veterinary Surgery is expanding, and we’re looking for dedicated professionals to join our second branch!

Led by Fear-Free Certified Dr Esther Lam, our team is fully Fear-Free trained and committed to creating positive veterinary experiences for pets, clients, and our team.

We care for a wide range of patients, including dogs, cats, pocket pets, birds, and exotics. If you're looking to expand your clinical knowledge across diverse species and be part of a close-knit, enthusiastic team, this is your opportunity.

Why Join Us?

  • Work-Life Balance: 4-day work week (one weekend day), flexible scheduling.
  • Supportive Environment: Experienced mentors, Fear-Free certified team, and team-oriented culture.
  • Diverse Caseload: From companion animals to exotics and avians—never a dull day.
  • Well-Equipped Clinic:
    Digital radiography
    Ultrasonography
    Cryotherapy
    iM3 GS dental unit
    IDEXX in-house lab (biochem & haematology)
    Dedicated surgery suite with isoflurane machine, suction, cautery, suction machine and more

What We’re Looking For:

Veterinarians

  • AVS-registered (recent grads & experienced vets welcome)
  • Proficient in routine surgeries
  • Eager to learn and grow
  • Excellent communication skills
  • Compassionate and Fear-Free mindset
  • Weekend availability (rotational)

What You’ll Receive:

  • Attractive Salary (commensurate with experience)
  • Up to 21 Days Annual Leave
  • Paid Study Leave + CPD Opportunities
  • Mentorship & Skill Development
  • A positive, nurturing workplace culture

If you're ready to thrive in a practice that values your growth, prioritises patient wellbeing, and embraces innovation—we’d love to hear from you.

📩 Send your resume and CV to info.pnc2020@gmail.com.

postedCompany.description:
Led by Fear-Free certified Dr Esther Lam, we are all Fear-Free trained and guided. We pride ourselves in providing excellent veterinary care with desirous working environment, touching the lives of both our patients and clients.

Our practice is well-equipped with digital radiography, ultrasonography, iM3 GS dental unit, in-house IDEXX biochemistry and haematology machines, surgery room with isoflurane-anaesthetic machine and many more.
postedCompany.name: PAWS N CLAWS VETERINARY SURGERY PTE. LTD.
